supplies.title: Alveary Grade 8 Science Kit
supplies.rationale: Less common supplies/materials for labs and lessons, including forceps, cups, candle, methylene blue, cotton swab, petri dishes, nutrient agar, iodine, sensitivity discs, antibiotic discs, gloves, and microscope coverslips and slides for Natural History.  General safety information is provided by manufacturer(s) and in the lab books, but teachers should educate themselves regarding local regulations for safe disposal of any materials.
supplies.note: Canadian members: The Learning House is able to provide the HST kits in Canada.
supplies.maySub: comparable items, if purchased or found separately; refer to kit contents at HST website for a list of supplies included in the kits and/or lessons/lab books for a comprehensive list of supplies needed for each lab.
supplies.qty: 1 kit for 1-3 students (Could stretch to 4, if needed.)

books.title: Alveary Grade 8 Science Kit
books.rationale: Less common supplies/materials for labs and lessons, including forceps, cups, candle, methylene blue, cotton swab, petri dishes, nutrient agar, iodine, sensitivity discs, antibiotic discs, gloves, and microscope coverslips and slides for Natural History.  General safety information is provided by manufacturer(s) and in the lab books, but teachers should educate themselves regarding local regulations for safe disposal of any materials.
books.note: Canadian members: The Learning House is able to provide the HST kits in Canada.
books.maySub: comparable items, if purchased or found separately; refer to kit contents at HST website for a list of supplies included in the kits and/or lessons/lab books for a comprehensive list of supplies needed for each lab.
books.qty: 1 kit for 1-3 students (Could stretch to 4, if needed.)

supplies.title: Household Items - General Science: Grade 8
supplies.note:
Typically easy for students to scavenge or teachers to obtain locally:
• 5 Starburst candies or similarly-shaped manufactured item
• sturdy wooden board at least 2-3" wide and 3.5' long to construct marble ramp
• anything to create rails for the ramp, more scrap wood, old pool noodles, etc.
• whatever is needed to attach the rails: bar clamps, hammer and nails, glue, etc.
• books or wood blocks to adjust height
• 3 smaller blocks to act as stops 
• 1-6 eggs (Term 1)
• water
• large sheet pan or flat location outside
• 2 plastic cups, 1 smaller and 1 larger
• various objects to test for sliding on ramp, such as small objects made of wood, plastic, metal, etc
• various Lego-type blocks that can be used to build a small box, roughly 1-2" dimensions 
• a larger bouncy ball, such as a basketball
• a location to bounce balls
• 1/2 c small solid fill material, such as cat food or rice
• 2 locations at 2 different temperatures, such as a sunny window and a chilly basement
• plastic wrap
• wire cutters, such as those on many pliers
• hammer
• at least 2 different light sources, including bright sunlight and at least 1 type of artificial light
• microwave
• microwave-safe casserole dish, at least 9"
• marshmallows to cover the bottom of the dish, Peeps or jumbo work best
• stopwatch, such as found on most electronic devices
• calculator, such as found on most electronic devices
• printables
• computer
• optional: hot glue gun
• optional: long forceps
• optional: matches
• optional: glass jar that is taller than a tea light candle
• optional: hard boiled egg (Term 2)

supplies.title: Prepared Microscope Slides
supplies.rationale: 25 prepared slides, including plants, insects, and animal tissues.  Scheduled in Grade 8 Natural History, high school Biology, and high school Botany, but fun to explore in grades 6+.
supplies.maySub: any variety set that includes the same/similar mounts; check lesson plans for the relevant subject for details.
supplies.usedInText:
Natural History: Grade 8
Science: Biology
Science: Botany

supplies.title: Student Microscope
supplies.rationale: To observe very small objects beginning in Grade 4. Especially needed in high school Biology, Botany, and Microbiology.
supplies.note: We recommend that the microscope be accessible for Grades 4+, as the tool helps cultivate scientific curiosity.
supplies.usedInText:
Science: Grade 4
Labs: Grade 5
Natural History: Grade 7
Natural History: Grade 8
Science: Biology
Science: Botany
Science: Microbiology

supplies.title: Household Items - Natural History: Grade 8
supplies.note:
Typically easy for students to scavenge or teachers to obtain locally:
• 8 Tbsp cornstarch
• 1-2 c milk (Term 1)
• 3-5 c white vinegar
• paper towels
• water
• 1 egg (Term 1)
• 3 antimicrobial agents used at home (e.g. soap, hydrogen peroxide, rubbing alcohol, essential oils, etc)

supplies.title: Slides and Coverslips
supplies.rationale: To accompany student microscope, replenish as needed
supplies.note: A small set is included in the HST Alveary kits for grades 4, 7, 8, and high school Biology.
supplies.usedInText:
Natural History: Grade 4
Labs: Grade 4
Labs: Grade 5
Natural History: Grade 7
Natural History: Grade 8
Biology Labs
Botany Labs

supplies.title: Scale/Balance
supplies.rationale: Students may use most any common kitchen scale/balance for science during the younger years, but at some point before high school a more accurate, precise, and sensitive scale should be obtained.
supplies.maySub: any reliable scale that goes down to 0.01g.
supplies.usedInText:
Labs: Grade 5
Labs: Grade 6
Labs: Grade 8
Science: Chemistry

supplies.title: Small Collection Containers
supplies.rationale: Take 1-2 outside on nature walks to collect specimens.  Sometimes used in science beginning in grade 3; students need 8 for lab in grade 8.
supplies.maySub: any recycled containers to collect items, such as jam, pesto, or sun-dried tomato jars; pick a regularly used pantry item and collect over time.
supplies.usedInText:
Nature Walks & Scouting: Grades 1-8
General Science: Grade 3
Labs: Grade 4
Labs: Grade 5
Labs: Grade 8

supplies.title: Hand Lens
supplies.rationale: Take outside on nature walks to view specimens up close and used occasionally in science.  May want more than one, depending on student interest.
supplies.maySub: any handheld magnifier that is easy to use.

supplies.title: Bird Feeder
supplies.rationale: Provides opportunities to observe birds regularly.
supplies.maySub: any bird feeder purchased or homemade.
supplies.usedInText:
General Science: Grade 1
Nature Walks & Scouting: Grades 1-8

supplies.title: Dip Net
supplies.rationale: Take to ponds or streams for collection and observation over multiple years.
supplies.maySub: any durable net or strainer for scooping in pond and stream.

supplies.title: Small Basin
supplies.rationale: Take to ponds or streams for collection and observation over multiple years; while not necessary, this collapsible one makes for easy carrying.

supplies.title: Student Microscope
supplies.rationale: Used in science beginning in Grade 4.  Optional for nature study in all grades.  Making the microscope available to examine found objects cultivates scientific curiosity.
supplies.note: Quality scopes can be found second-hand or on sale regularly.
supplies.usedInText:
Nature Walks & Scouting: Grades 1-8
